flags.label: Debt-to-earnings
flags.summary: Debt-to-earnings ratio of 8.8% at The Juilliard School exceeds the 8% gainful-employment threshold ($25.0k debt amortized over 10 years vs $37.8k earnings).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at The Juilliard School rose 19% between 2006 and 2009 ($25.6k → $30.5k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at The Juilliard School rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($51.2k → $58.0k).

flags.label: Earnings trend · post-entry horizons
flags.summary: Earnings 10 years post-entry at The Juilliard School are 71% above 6-year earnings ($22.1k → $37.8k).
